creator: ciaduck@gmail.com
text:
Hello. I'm an OPNsense user, and I'm having this exact issue.

What can I do to help? I have 2 different USB NICs (Anker and Ugreen), and both exhibit this behavior.

I'd really like to help solve this issue, because it impacts many and I think it would be very nice to be able to use USB NICs on my firewall PC.


Thanks!
